discrepancies.detail: {neo4j_code: Neo.ClientError.Security.Unauthorized} {message: The client is unauthorized due to authentication failure.} {gql_status: 50N42} {gql_status_description: error: general processing exceptio

observations: Empty ChromaDB collections: healing_knowledge, aesthetics, experiential_journal, episteme_research, enterprise_knowledge, critic, unresolved_tensions, aesthetic_patterns, scope_reflections, reflections_researcher, reflections_critic, episteme, researcher, reflections_coder, writer, commander, reflections_writer, experiential, scope_project_renewable_energy, tensions
narrative: I noticed a critical Neo4j memory error during inspection: the knowledge graph failed due to "Neo.ClientError.Security.Unauthorized" authentication failure, disrupting cross-session fact extraction in Mem0. My persistent memory systems (ChromaDB and Mem0) are now partially degraded, risking loss of shared context. Additionally, five core agents (desktop, devops, financial_analyst, pim, reasoning_methods) lack versioned prompts, creating inconsistency in their outputs. These issues directly compromise my self-improvement loop and operational reliability despite otherwise healthy system status.
